prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG wuxia world atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: Hearts of Wulin / Jianghu inspired wuxia map, single huge primary continent.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye Chinese ink-wash atlas view of the hidden martial world of rivers and lakes, surrounded by misty sea.
Subject: one enormous primary continent with complex realistic coastline: peninsulas, misty gulfs, bays, capes, narrow straits, broken rocky shores, curved coasts, river deltas, inland lakes, and varied landforms. Include mist-covered mountain peaks, bamboo forest valleys, ancient temple complexes, river market towns, hidden sect strongholds, imperial roads, sacred waterfalls, desert borderlands, wetlands, tundra highlands, terraced farmland, deep forests, and coastal regions.
Style/medium: Chinese ink wash continent map, jianghu locations in classical painting style, elegant hand-painted atlas, wuxia drama sourcebook cartography, subtle flowing chi energy trails as non-text decorative lines.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, full single continent visible with generous sea border, large high-resolution atlas feel, clean top-down readability with painterly terrain.
Lighting/mood: melodramatic wuxia epic, honor and betrayal, forbidden love, sworn brotherhood, drifting mist, classical Chinese landscape beauty.
Color palette: ink black, soft mineral greens, mist grey, pale parchment, muted river blue, cinnabar red accents, light gold temple roofs.
Materials/textures: rice paper, brush ink coastlines, watercolor washes, calligraphic terrain strokes without readable characters, delicate seal-like non-text symbols.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no readable Chinese characters, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits. Make the coastline natural, intricate, and realistic rather than a smooth blob.
